**Bruce Evans** was an American [Negro league](/wiki/Negro_league "Negro league") [outfielder](/wiki/Outfielder "Outfielder") in the 1910s.

Evans played for the [All Nations](/wiki/All_Nations "All Nations") club in 1916. In six recorded games, he posted four hits in 25 plate appearances.[[1]](#cite_note-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2)
